news-korea-econ.title: MORNING GLORY: What will Donald Trump's legacy be as a wartime president?
news-korea-econ.description: Analysis compares Trump's tough stance on Iran to previous presidents, examining decades of U.S.-Iran conflict and nuclear weapons concerns in the region.

news-global-econ.title: Al Jazeera op-ed praises US-Israel operation against Iran, says Dems, media critics are wrong
news-global-econ.description: Al Jazeera is offering praise to US and Israel's Operation Epic Fury and its effectiveness against the Iranian regime in an op-ed from Doha Institute associate professor Muhanad Seloom.

news-global-econ.title: I run a fracking company — New York banned the industry and stuck the poor with the bill
news-global-econ.description: New York's fracking ban creates energy poverty for 2.7 million residents while Pennsylvania neighbors profit from natural gas drilling.

news-global-econ.title: Why Gulf states aren’t joining the war against Iran — despite attacks on their soil
news-global-econ.description: Gulf states maintain restraint despite reported Iranian attacks on Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Qatar and Kuwait, prioritizing regional stability.

news-global-econ.title: Fraud scrutiny clouds Schumer’s Obamacare credit push after his Pentagon ‘luxury’ spending jab
news-global-econ.description: Schumer slams Pentagon's $93B spending spree, pushes ACA subsidies instead. Critics cite widespread fraud in healthcare program with phantom enrollees.

news-global-econ.title: SEN WICKER: Ending China’s drone dominance with a made-in-America revival
news-global-econ.description: Congress and Donald Trump allocated $2.5 billion for Pentagon small drone purchases, launching Drone Dominance program with American vendors to compete globally.

news-global-soc.title: Top E.U. Diplomat on Middle East Conflict: 'This Is Not Europe's War'
news-global-soc.description:
The European Union’s top diplomat, Kaja Kallas, said during a Monday press conference the ongoing war in Iran is "not Europe's war," but noted Europe's interests are "directly at stake" as the conflict widens.

news-global-soc.title: Bessent pushes back on CNBC reporter over Trump’s Russian oil strategy
news-global-soc.description: Scott Bessent challenged CNBC’s framing of global oil shortages, arguing markets remain supplied despite disruptions tied to the Iran conflict.
